mapper.sql: id, store_no, goods_no, goods_price, goods_stock, goods_type, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into goods_store (id, store_no, goods_no, goods_price, goods_stock, goods_type, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{goodsStock,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into goods_store
id,
store_no,
goods_no,
goods_price,
goods_stock,
goods_type,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{goodsStock,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update goods_store
store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_price = #{goodsPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
goods_stock = #{goodsStock,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_type = #{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update goods_store set store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_price = #{goodsPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, goods_stock = #{goodsStock,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_type = #{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select gs.id,gs.store_no,gs.goods_no,gs.goods_price,gs.goods_stock,gs.goods_type,gs.create_time,gs.update_time, g.id gid, g.goods_no ggoods_no, g.goods_name, g.category_id, g.goods_introduce, g.goods_content, g.goods_state,g.goods_picture, g.goods_market_price, g.create_time gcreate_time, g.update_time gupdate_time,s.id sid, s.area_id, s.store_no sstore_no, s.store_name, s.store_address, s.max_longitude, s.max_latitude, s.min_longitude,s.min_latitude, s.longitude, s.latitude, s.store_introduce, s.start_time, s.close_time, s.store_status, s.create_time screate_time, s.update_time from goods_store gs inner join goods g on gs.goods_no=g.goods_no inner join store s on gs.store_no=s.store_no
and s.store_name like concat('%',#{storeName},'%')
and g.goods_name like concat('%',#{goodsName},'%')
and g.goods_content=#{goodsContent}
order by gs.create_time desc
